message:
Restructure web_fetch cache to date-bucketed dirs, improve test coverage

Cache layout changed from .serf/web_cache/<hash>-raw.<ext> to
.serf/web_cache/yyyy-mm-dd/<hash>/raw.<ext> and rendered.md for
better inspectability and cleanup.

Added tests: extFromContentType table test, cache path structure,
tool result contains file paths, HTTP 404 error propagation, invalid
URL scheme error message verification. Task store: View() defensive
copy test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
